title: protium decandrum
intro: Protium decandrum, also known as the Malabar tamarind, is a species of tree in the family Clusiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Protium decandrum include aiding in weight loss, managing diabetes, and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
